results.title: Pathway and network analysis of more than 2500 whole cancer genomes
results.why_it_matters: PCAWG flagship pathway+network analysis: 7 methods across 2583 WGS cancers / 27 tumor types. Ensemble-of-methods template.

results.title: Integrative pathway enrichment analysis of multivariate omics data
results.why_it_matters: ActivePathways — fuses multiple per-dataset p-value streams into a single pathway enrichment. Input format matches gene_cancer_study layout.

results.title: Pan-cancer network analysis identifies combinations of rare somatic mutations across pathways and protein complexes
results.why_it_matters: Canonical pan-cancer network result: 16 significantly mutated subnetworks across 3281 TCGA samples / 12 cancer types.

results.title: Pathway-based dissection of the genomic heterogeneity of cancer hallmarks' acquisition with SLAPenrich
results.why_it_matters: Explicit per-gene exonic-length + mutation-rate + mutual-exclusivity correction in the null; closest off-the-shelf match to our gene-length-normalized pooled ratios.

results.title: A compendium of mutational cancer driver genes
results.why_it_matters: 568-driver consensus across 7 methods, 28k tumors, 66 cancer types. Reference standard for pan-cancer drivers and ensemble-of-methods design pattern.

results.title: NetSig: network-based discovery from cancer genomes
results.why_it_matters: Network-based driver detection with degree-bias correction; concrete template for layering a PPI prior on gene-level counts without hub artifacts.

results.title: Pathway enrichment analysis and visualization of omics data using g:Profiler, GSEA, Cytoscape and EnrichmentMap
results.why_it_matters: Off-the-shelf baseline workflow for pathway enrichment; 1450+ citations.

results.title: Hierarchical HotNet: identifying hierarchies of altered subnetworks
results.why_it_matters: Extension of HotNet2 returning subnetwork hierarchies rather than a flat list; used in Reyna 2020 PCAWG.

results.title: Network-based stratification of tumor mutations
results.why_it_matters: Foundational patient-clustering-on-mutation-network method; upgrade path for the pipeline's patient-clustering outputs.

results.title: Inference of patient-specific pathway activities from multi-dimensional cancer genomics data using PARADIGM
results.why_it_matters: Per-sample pathway activity inference via factor graphs; requires expression, deferred.

results.title: Automated network analysis identifies core pathways in glioblastoma
results.why_it_matters: Pathway module discovery via PPI seed graph; cBioPortal-ecosystem tool.

results.title: Algorithms for detecting significantly mutated pathways in cancer
results.why_it_matters: Original heat-diffusion formulation; precursor to HotNet2.

results.title: Discovering causal pathways linking genomic events to transcriptional states using Tied Diffusion Through Interacting Events (TieDIE)
results.why_it_matters: Bidirectional diffusion coupling mutation-end with expression-end of a pathway.

results.title: Genomic and molecular landscape of DNA damage repair deficiency across The Cancer Genome Atlas
results.why_it_matters: End-to-end pathway-level pan-cancer result exemplar for a single pathway family (DDR).

results.title: Cancer-mutation network and the number and specificity of driver mutations
results.venue: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences USA
results.why_it_matters: Complements static pathway-enrichment framing with a network-evolution angle across cancer types.

results.title: The COSMIC Cancer Gene Census: describing genetic dysfunction across all human cancers
results.why_it_matters: Curated reference gene catalog used as benchmark ground truth.

results.title: Comprehensive evaluation of computational methods for predicting cancer driver genes
results.why_it_matters: Head-to-head of 12 driver methods across 8 benchmark datasets; closest current comparator — but gene-level, not pathway-level.

results.title: Pan-cancer analysis of whole genomes
results.first_author: ICGC/TCGA Pan-Cancer Analysis of Whole Genomes Consortium
results.why_it_matters: Umbrella paper for PCAWG set; individual method papers are operational.

results.title: Directional integration and pathway enrichment analysis for multi-omics data
results.why_it_matters: ActivePathways successor that adds directional multi-omics integration; not needed for mutation-only.

results.title: Multi-context modeling of driver pathways reveals common and specific mechanisms across 23 cancer types
results.why_it_matters: Recent pathway-level cross-cancer modeling; worth tracking for methodology ideas.
